scripts.fix: bun run format:fix && bun run lint:fix
scripts.test:unit: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml run --rm test bun test test/unit
scripts.test:integration: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml run --rm test bun test test/integration
scripts.test:coverage: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml run --rm test bun test --coverage
scripts.test:e2e: docker compose -f docker-compose.e2e.yml up -d --build --wait && (bun test test/e2e; rc=$?; docker compose -f docker-compose.e2e.yml down; exit $rc)
scripts.build:ui:check: bun run build:ui && git diff --exit-code static/ && git ls-files --others --exclude-standard static/ | (! grep .)
scripts.render:check: bun run render:golden && git diff --exit-code test/golden/ && git ls-files --others --exclude-standard test/golden/ | (! grep .)
scripts.test:all: bun run build:ui:check && bun run render:check && bun run render:pure && bun run test && bun run test:e2e
